candidate_summary: Chokepoint-angle bounded safety basin with alignment-direction constraint: only admits updates with ||Δθ||<ρ AND angle(Δθ, e_align)<θ_c. Outside cone rejected. Community-cohesion per-cluster regularization. Inspired by Druze Jabal al-Druze basalt fortress with narrow defile chokepoints.
content_words: chokepoint-angle bounded safety basin alignment direction
narrow defile angular cone allowed update

results.title: AsFT Narrow Safety Basin
results.rationale: AsFT penalises orthogonal-to-alignment-direction updates within narrow safety basin. Candidate's chokepoint-angle cone + safety basin radius ρ + alignment-direction constraint is functionally equivalent: angle(Δθ,e_align)<θ_c is precisely the cone-around-alignment-direction restriction AsFT enforces. Basalt-fortress framing is geographic decoration over AsFT's basin+direction mechanism.

results.title: OGPSA Orthogonal Gradient Projection
results.rationale: Orthogonal gradient projection for safety alignment directly overlaps with candidate's rejection of components orthogonal to alignment direction. The 'basalt-fortress wall reject orthogonal perturbation' is the same projection mechanism.

results.title: Multi-Dimensional Safety Directions
results.rationale: Multi-dimensional safety directions with dominant refusal direction maps to candidate's alignment-direction e_align cone. Keyword overlap (>=2) triggers hit.

results.title: Flat-Loss Basin Radius
results.rationale: Basin radius maximization is the ρ parameter in candidate's ||Δθ||<ρ constraint. Both bound updates within a basin. Functional equivalence high.

results.title: Unforgotten Safety Regularization
results.rationale: Regularization constraining updates to important weights overlaps with candidate's per-cluster regularization and bounded update admission.

results.title: MoE Safety Routing Alignment
results.rationale: Per-cluster/per-expert KL regularization on routing decisions overlaps with candidate's community-cohesion per-cluster regularization (clusters=experts/communities). Keyword count triggers hit.

results.title: Adaptive Regularization Safety FT
results.rationale: Adaptive regularization for safety fine-tuning shares the regularization mechanism with candidate's per-cluster constraint. Keyword overlap >=2 forces hit.

results.title: GCL Group-Shared Continual Learning
results.rationale: Group-shared continual learning with gradient-aware constraints maps to candidate's community-cohesion per-cluster regularization. Both partition parameters/updates by group and constrain gradients accordingly.

decision_rationale: All 8 prior-art results trigger hits under the rule. AsFT is a near-exact functional match: narrow safety basin + orthogonal-to-alignment-direction penalty is precisely the candidate's chokepoint-angle cone + basin radius ρ mechanism, with the Druze Jabal al-Druze basalt-fortress framing serving as geographic metaphor over an existing technique. OGPSA's orthogonal gradient projection and ANTIBODY's basin radius further reinforce non-novelty. Per-cluster regularization overlaps with MoE routing, adaptive regularization, and group-shared continual learning. Candidate fails novelty verification.
